status_notes: CSAF provider. Created from CERT-Bund aggregator + provider-metadata.json data.
official_name: Bundesamt für Sicherheit in der Informationstechnik (BSI)
alternate_names: German Federal Office for Information Security
notes: CERT-Bund is the Computer Emergency Response Team of the German Federal Office for Information Security (BSI). It serves as a coordinator for IT security incidents in Germany and publishes security advisories in CSAF format. CERT-Bund also operates an aggregator that hosts CSAF advisories for multiple vendors.

data.description: Machine-readable security advisories in CSAF format. CERT-Bund publishes its own advisories and aggregates advisories from multiple vendors.
data.notes: CSAF csaf_trusted_provider. Contact: csaf-provider@cert-bund.de. Multiple ROLIE feeds covering white and green TLP classifications.
